name: Tenth Avenue Petroleum Corp.
summary: Tenth Avenue Petroleum Corp., a junior oil and gas exploration company, engages in the exploration, development, and production of petroleum and natural gas properties in Western Canada. It has a 22% interest in a non-operating disposal well in Ft. Nelson, British Columbia. The company was formerly known as Jadela Oil Corp. and changed its name to Tenth Avenue Petroleum Corp. in May 2015. Tenth Avenue Petroleum Corp. is based in Calgary, Canada.
